title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 324.260 - Complaints against massage business or therapist, procedure
text:
324.260.  Complaints against massage business or therapist, procedure. — The board may cause a complaint to be filed in the circuit court of the county in which any massage business alleged to be violating the provisions of sections 324.240 to 324.275 is located for an injunction to restrain the massage business from continuing such violation.
(L. 1998 H.B. 1601, et al., A.L. 1999 H.B. 343 merged with S.B. 362)
